## Drug Coverage

| Drug | Tier | Status | Requirements |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| amlodipine-atorvastatin oral tablet 10-10 mg, 10- 20 mg, 10-40 mg, 10-80 mg, 5-10 mg, 5-20 mg, 5- 40 mg, 5-80 mg | Not on Formulary | Not on Formulary (Not Covered) | — |
| atorvastatin oral tablet 10 mg, 20 mg, 40 mg, 80 mg | Preferred Generic | Covered | Preventive No Cost |

_This drug is classified as an ACA Preventive Drug. Federal law requires $0 cost-sharing for preventive drugs — no copay or coinsurance applies._
source: Essentials Formulary Drug List (E4) | Pages 81 || Premera Employees Health Plan – Standard PPO Retiree Plan | Page 18
